lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: What do you want? I'm a little busy here, so make it quick!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you sell me any food?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I suppose I could sell you some cabbage, if you're willing to pay for it. Cabbage is good for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I haven't got any money.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Why are you asking me to sell you food if you haven't got any money? Go away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I haven't got enough space to carry it.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Why are you asking me to sell you food if you can't carry it? Go away!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, I'll buy a cabbage.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: It's a deal. Now, make sure you eat it all up. Cabbage is good for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I don't like cabbage.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Bah! People these days only appreciate junk food.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you give me any free food?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Can you give me any free money?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why should I give you free money?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Why should I give you free food?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, forget it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't want anything from this horrible kitchen.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: How dare you? I put a lot of effort into cleaning this kitchen. My daily sweat and elbow-grease keep this kitchen clean!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ewww!

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Oh, just leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Very well done, take this.
